Name: Eastman EEP 082N Hand Planer 600W 82mm Cutting Width Speed 15000 RPM Woodworking Power Smoothing Surfacing Includes Free Extra Carbon Brush Set
Description: POWERFUL PERFORMANCE: Equipped with a robust 600W motor delivering a high no-load speed of 15,000 RPM, ensuring smooth, fast, and effortless material removal on both hard and soft woods. OPTIMAL CUTTING CAPACITY: Features a standard 82mm (3-1/4 inch) cutting width, making it the perfect size for framing, door resizing, joist leveling, and general woodworking projects. PRECISION WOODWORKING: Designed for professional carpenters and DIY enthusiasts alike, providing the accuracy needed for surface smoothing, edge chamfering, and flattening rough timber. ERGONOMIC CONTROL: Built with user comfort in mind, the well-balanced design and comfortable grip help reduce hand fatigue during extended use while maintaining stable, accurate cuts. EXTRA VALUE INCLUDED: Comes complete with a free replacement carbon brush set, allowing you to easily maintain the motor's performance and extend the lifespan of your power tool without additional costs. › See more product details
